entities.name: RoutingGraph
entities.description: Token adjacency graph for arbitrage routing. Maps token addresses to directed swap edges. Supports multi-protocol edges between same token pairs. Maintains indexes by pool, by pair, and reference counts for incremental updates.

entities.name: SwapEdge
entities.description: Directed swap edge between two tokens backed by a single pool. Carries protocol info, direction (zeroForOne), precomputed fee in bps, swap simulation function, and a live stateRef object that is mutated in-place by the watcher for zero-copy state freshness.

entities.name: ArbPath
entities.description: Annotated arbitrage cycle path. Contains start token, ordered edge list, hop count, cumulative log-weight (negative = profitable at spot), and cumulative fees in bps. Produced by BFS-based path enumeration.

entities.name: CycleEnumerator
entities.description: Path discovery engine that enumerates arbitrage cycles for given start tokens using configurable hop depths (2-hop, 3-hop forward BFS; 4-hop meet-in-middle bidirectional BFS; 5+ hop DFS with bounded expansions). Resolves search options and filters by hop count.

entities.name: CandidateAssessmentSummary
entities.description: Tracks pipeline assessment statistics: shortlisted, assessed, missing token rates, optimized candidates, second-chance re-optimizations, profitable, rejected, and rejection reason breakdown.

entities.name: RouteCache
entities.description: Top-N profitable route cache storing up to maxSize (default 1000) routes. Indexed by pool address for fast re-validation against watched pool changes. Supports update, getByPools, prune, removeByPools, removeByRoute, and clear.

entities.name: WorkerPool
entities.description: Persistent worker thread pool for parallel path evaluation and enumeration. Maintains N workers with state mirroring (delta sync), topology caching, pool-to-pool state version tracking, self-healing respawn on crash, and OOM failure gating. Splits paths into locality-aware chunks by start token.

entities.name: PredictiveStateCache
entities.description: Shadow state cache that pre-computes simulation results for top-N cached routes. Maintains token-to-paths and pool-to-paths indexes for targeted stale marking and re-simulation. Uses round-robin prefetching during idle cycles. Evicts least profitable paths when over capacity.

entities.name: PredictiveCacheAdapter
entities.description: Adapter layer wrapping PredictiveStateCache with lifecycle management (initialize, shutdown), provider injection (gas price, token rate), and batched affected-route queries for the re-validation pipeline.

entities.name: PathSearchGraph
entities.description: Minimal graph interface for path enumeration: getEdges, getEdgesBetween, hasToken.

entities.name: RouteState
entities.description: Generic pool state record containing protocol-specific fields (reserve0, reserve1 for V2, sqrtPriceX96 for V3, balances for Curve/Balancer, baseReserve/quoteReserve for Dodo, etc.). Stored in RouteStateCache keyed by normalized pool address.

entities.name: RouteSimulationResult
entities.description: Full route simulation output including amountIn, amountOut, profit, hop amounts per edge, total gas estimate, pool path, token path, protocols, and hop count.

entities.name: SimulatedHopResult
entities.description: Single hop simulation result: amountOut and gasEstimate.

entities.name: ScoredRoute
entities.description: Route annotated with runtime profitability metrics: net profit (after gas), composite score, ROI, and gas cost in token units. Used for ranking before execution.

entities.name: SerializedTopology
entities.description: Structured-clone-safe graph topology. A record mapping token address to arrays of SerializedTopologyEdge with stripped swapFn and compact stateRef. Sent to workers for enumeration.

entities.name: WorkerRequest
entities.description: Union of all worker message payloads (EVALUATE, ENUMERATE, SYNC_STATE, SYNC_TOPOLOGY) with numeric job id.

entities.name: predictivePathEntry
entities.description: Entry in the predictive shadow state: cached simulation results, affected token/pool sets, staleness flag and reason, last update timestamp.

entities.name: CandidateEntryLike
entities.description: Generic candidate entry containing a path and its quick simulation result. Used by the assessment pipeline.

entities.name: POLYGON_HUB_TOKENS
entities.description: Set of tier-1 and tier-2 hub token addresses on Polygon (WMATIC, WETH, USDC.e, USDC, USDT, DAI, WBTC, stMATIC, MaticX, FRAX, miMATIC, LINK, AAVE, CRV, BAL, QUICK, GHST, SAND, MANA). Used as seeds for full-graph phase-2 cycle enumeration.

entities.name: HUB_4_TOKENS
entities.description: The 5 highest-liquidity base tokens on Polygon (WMATIC, WETH, USDC.e, USDC, USDT) used by the hub-graph phase-1 enumeration.

relationships.description: Factory function that constructs a RoutingGraph from pool records and state map, calling addPoolEdges for each pool.
Factory function that builds a RoutingGraph filtered to pools touching at least one hub token.
CycleEnumerator wraps a PathSearchGraph and discovers arbitrage cycles via BFS using getEdges and getEdgesBetween.
Top-level path finding function that instantiates a CycleEnumerator and calls enumerate() with given start tokens and options.
Single-graph cycle enumeration entry point. Calls findArbPaths, deduplicates, optionally prunes by liquidity, then selects top paths by log-weight.

Dual-graph hub-first cycle enumeration. Phase 1 uses hub graph (HUB_4_TOKENS, all depths); Phase 2 uses full graph (POLYGON_HUB_TOKENS, 3-hop only). Merges, deduplicates, prunes, and caps by maxTotalPaths.

Pipeline entry point that shortlists candidates via selectOptimizationCandidates, then assesses each with optional optimization pass and second-chance re-optimization for routes that failed initial assessment.
Tracks assessment statistics throughout the pipeline run, returned as part of the result.
Scores each viable candidate using scoreRoute with composite ranking (profit, ROI, score, log-weight, cross-protocol diversity) before selecting top N candidates.
Iterates over path edges, calling simulateHop for each hop with the current accumulated amount. Accumulates gas estimates, hop amounts, pool path, and token path.
Looks up pool state from edge.stateRef or stateCache, then dispatches to protocol-specific swap math (V2, V3, Curve, Balancer, Dodo, Woofi).
Batch evaluates each path via simulateRoute at a test amount, optionally runs optimizeInputAmount on profitable ones, returns sorted by profit descending.
Routes evaluation to workerPool.evaluate() when path count exceeds EVAL_WORKER_THRESHOLD and WORKER_COUNT >= 2; falls back to synchronous evaluatePaths otherwise.
Spawns persistent_worker.ts Worker instances. Each worker handles EVALUATE, ENUMERATE, SYNC_STATE, and SYNC_TOPOLOGY message types with local state map and topology cache.
Uses ternary search over the input amount range to find the optimal trade size, calling simulateRoute as the evaluation function with result caching.
Retrieves canonical hop count for hop penalty computation in the scoring formula.
Computes stable route identity string from path's start token and edges for deduplication in the cache.
PredictiveStateCache reads from RouteCache.getAll() to populate its shadow state with pre-computed simulation results.
Simulates paths in the shadow state using simulateRouteUncached with the live state cache for fresh results.
PredictiveCacheAdapter wraps PredictiveStateCache and provides lifecycle management, provider injection, and affected-route queries.

Computes estimated TVL of a pool in WMATIC-wei using token prices from getRateWei. Dispatches to protocol-specific formulas: V2 (reserve0+reserve1), V3 (virtual reserves from sqrtPrice+liquidity), Dodo (base+quote), Balancer/Curve/Woofi (balances sum).
Removes paths having the same route identity (ordered pool set), keeping only the first occurrence.
Splits candidates into fresh and stale based on per-path freshness check against pool state timestamps.
Checks each edge's pool state timestamp in the state cache against maxAge and maxSkew thresholds.
Converts a RoutingGraph adjacency to a structured-clone-safe SerializedTopology with compact stateRefs for worker transfer.
Reconstructs a lightweight RoutingGraph from a SerializedTopology for enumeration in worker threads.
Computes log(spotOut/spotIn) for a single edge using live stateRef. V2: -log((rOut/rIn)*fee); V3: -log(sqrtP²*(1-fee)); Curve/Balancer/Dodo/Woofi: simulation-based probe log-weight.
Annotates a path with cumulative log-weight (sum of edge log-weights) and cumulative fees in bps.

Prunes edges with zero/near-zero liquidity. V2: reserve thresholds and price-impact check; V3: sqrtPriceX96 + liquidity > 0; Curve/Balancer: positive balances; Dodo: base+quote reserves > 0; Woofi: feasible base token states.
Resolves tokenInIdx/tokenOutIdx from explicit edge indices, state.tokens array lookup, or zeroForOne fallback for 2-token pools.
Barrel export: RoutingGraph, buildGraph, buildHubGraph, POLYGON_HUB_TOKENS, HUB_4_TOKENS, serializeTopology, deserializeTopology.
Barrel export: CycleEnumerator, find2HopPaths, find3HopPaths, find4HopPathsBidirectional, findArbPaths, deduplicatePaths, routeKeyFromEdges, edgeSpotLogWeight, annotatePath, pathCumulativeFeesBps.
Barrel export: enumerateCycles, enumerateCyclesDual, enumerateCyclesForToken, cycleSummary.
Barrel export: simulateHop, simulateRoute, optimizeInputAmount, evaluatePaths, evaluatePathsParallel.
Cycle enumeration options extend path finder options with maxTotalPaths, hubTokensOnly, dedup, minLiquidityWmatic, getRateWei, startTokens, and phase-specific budgets.
Singleton WorkerPool instance initialized with WORKER_COUNT from config.
Worker thread ENUMERATE handler: deserializes topology, runs findArbPaths, serializes results as compact path descriptors.
Worker thread EVALUATE handler: rehydrates state data, calls evaluatePaths, returns profitable results.
Computes serialisedKey for each path to map worker results back to original path objects.

global_variables.name: DEFAULT_POLYGON_HUB_TOKENS
global_variables.description: Default hub token addresses on Polygon chain including tier-1 bluechips (WMATIC, WETH, USDC.e, USDC, USDT, DAI, WBTC), tier-2 LSDs (stMATIC, MaticX), secondary stablecoins (FRAX, miMATIC), DeFi governance tokens (LINK, AAVE, CRV, BAL, QUICK), and long-tail gaming tokens (GHST, SAND, MANA).

global_variables.name: DEFAULT_HUB_4_TOKENS
global_variables.description: Top 5 liquidity base tokens for hub-graph phase-1 enumeration. Intentionally small because each extra token roughly doubles hub graph pool count.

global_variables.name: WORKER_URL
global_variables.description: URL reference to persistent_worker.ts module, used by WorkerPool to spawn new workers.

global_variables.name: WORKER_EXEC_ARGV
global_variables.description: Process exec arguments for worker threads, adding --import tsx if not already inherited from parent.

global_variables.name: STARTUP_OOM_FAILURE_LIMIT
global_variables.description: Maximum consecutive startup OOM failures before a worker slot is permanently disabled (3).

data_flow.description: Arbitrage route discovery and evaluation pipeline
steps: RoutingGraph → CycleEnumerator.findArbPaths(startTokens) → ArbPath[] (annotated with logWeight + fees)
ArbPath[] → enumerateCycles/enumerateCyclesDual → deduplicated, liquidity-pruned, top-N sorted ArbPath[]
ArbPath[] + RouteStateCache → simulator.evaluatePaths() → EvaluatedRoute[] (simulated with test amount)
Profitable routes → RouteCache.update() → persistent top-N cache indexed by pool
RouteCache.getByPools(changedPools) → affected routes → re-validation on watcher batch
PredictiveCacheAdapter wraps predictive state for idle-time pre-computation ahead of arb scans
WorkerPool distributes EVALUATE and ENUMERATE work across persistent worker threads with delta state sync
